hooks.prompt: Review the assistant's final response. If it delivers quantitative findings, reports, or notebooks with numerical claims (p-values, effect sizes, percentages, cosine values, etc.), check: did the assistant run validation agents (via /validate-claims or Agent tool) to verify the numbers against source data BEFORE delivering? If validation was skipped and numerical claims were made, respond NO with a brief explanation. If no numerical claims were made, or validation was performed, respond YES.
